testcase.name: test_write_to_disk_creates_files

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'total_files_written' in {'files': [{'language': 'json', 'path': '/app/generated/WriteTestProject/frontend/package.json', 'relative_path': 'WriteTestProject/frontend/package.json', 'size_bytes': 405}, {'language': 'typescript', 'path': '/app/generated/WriteTestProject/frontend/app/layout.tsx', 'relative_path': 'WriteTestProject/frontend/app/layout.tsx', 'size_bytes': 359}, {'language': 'typescript', 'path': '/app/generated/WriteTestProject/frontend/app/page.tsx', 'relative_path': 'WriteTestProject/frontend/app/page.tsx', 'size_bytes': 268}, {'language': 'typescript', 'path': '/app/generated/WriteTestProject/frontend/tailwind.config.ts', 'relative_path': 'WriteTestProject/frontend/tailwind.config.ts', 'size_bytes': 244}, {'language': 'text', 'path': '/app/generated/WriteTestProject/backend/requirements.txt', 'relative_path': 'WriteTestProject/backend/requirements.txt', 'size_bytes': 113}, {'language': 'python', 'path': '/app/generated/WriteTestProject/backend/app/main.py', 'relative_path': 'WriteTestProject/backend/app/main.py', 'size_bytes': 583}, ...], 'message': 'Successfully wrote 15 files to disk', 'output_directory': '/app/generated/WriteTestProject', 'project_name': 'WriteTestProject', ...}

testcase.name: test_full_workflow_generate_write_verify
testcase.failure: tests/test_build_engine.py:413: in test_full_workflow_generate_write_verify assert write_data["total_files_written"] >= 14 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'total_files_written'
